content: App crashes every time I try to place an intraday order. Very frustrating experience.
Love the clean UI and easy navigation. Best trading app I have used so far.
Withdrawal takes 3-4 days which is too slow. Please fix the settlement process.
Mutual fund SIP setup is super easy. Great experience investing monthly.
Customer support took 45 minutes to respond on call. Terrible service when you need help urgently.
Charts are very basic compared to TradingView. Need better charting tools for F&O trading.
The app is very smooth on my phone. No lag at all even during market hours.
I lost money because the app froze during a volatile session. Unacceptable for a trading platform.
IPO application process is seamless. Applied for 3 IPOs without any issues.
Exit load information is not clearly shown before redeeming mutual funds. Needs improvement.
Love the portfolio analysis feature. XIRR and dividend tracking are very helpful.
App keeps logging me out randomly. Have to re-enter PIN every few minutes.
Gold investment option is a nice addition. Easy to buy and track digital gold.
The option chain loads very slowly. By the time it loads the price has already moved.
Groww has made investing so simple for beginners. I recommend it to all my friends.
Cannot set trailing stop loss. This is a basic feature that every trading app should have.
SIP calculator is very useful for planning long term investments. Good feature.
App crashed during market opening and I could not exit my overnight positions.
Commodity trading was added recently and it works well. Traded crude oil without issues.
Customer support chat bot is useless. It cannot understand simple queries.
The brokerage charges are transparent and clearly displayed before placing orders. Nice.
Drag and drop stop loss on chart would be amazing. Currently have to enter price manually.
Imported all my external mutual funds easily. Great consolidation feature.
App does not support GTT orders for all stocks. Please expand GTT availability.
Funds take too long to settle after selling stocks. T+1 settlement should be faster.
The dark mode is really well done. Easy on the eyes during long trading sessions.
Tried to contact support via email but no response for 5 days. Contact info support@groww.in did not help.
Basket order feature for options is a game changer. Can place multiple legs at once.
Mutual fund NAV update is delayed. Shows yesterday NAV even in the afternoon.
Account opening was done in 10 minutes. Fastest demat account opening experience.
The app hangs when scrolling through watchlist with many stocks added.
F&O margin calculator is accurate and helps plan trades better.
Withdrawal failed twice and money was stuck for a week. Very concerning.
The stock screener filters are very comprehensive. Found great picks using it.
Please add bracket orders for intraday trading. OCO alone is not sufficient.
Notifications for price alerts are delayed by several minutes. Makes them pointless.
Excellent app for long term mutual fund investors. SIP tracking is top notch.
The app shows wrong P&L sometimes. My actual profit was different from what was displayed.
Love the instant pledge feature for F&O. Can use my stock holdings as margin immediately.
Customer support phone number +919108800000 is always busy. Cannot get through to anyone.
The learn section with articles and videos is very educational for new investors.
Order execution is lightning fast. Trades go through in milliseconds.
App crashed 3 times today during market hours. Lost potential profits because of this.
Tax P&L statement download feature is very useful during ITR filing season.
Switched from another broker. Groww UX is miles ahead. Clean and intuitive.
Please add a proper paper trading or simulator mode for beginners to practice.
Money withdrawn on Monday still not received on Thursday. Contacted support and they said wait more. My phone is 8765432109.
Real time market data is accurate. No discrepancy with exchange data.
Would love to see a desktop trading platform in addition to the mobile app.
Overall great app. Small bugs here and there but the team keeps improving. Keep it up.
